title: Generic Function
description: Create a generic function that can operate on any type provided it satisfies specific trait bounds.
problemStatement:
Universal code! Write a generic function `largest<T: PartialOrd + Copy>` that takes a slice of elements `&[T]` and returns the largest one.

**Requirement:** Use the `T` generic type parameter with `PartialOrd` and `Copy` trait bounds.
hints: Trait bounds allow you to restrict which types can be used for a generic parameter based on their behavior.
expectedOutput: The largest item in the list
